violations.text: Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Proper sanitizing procedures reviewed with person in charge. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Containers of Cut Fruit was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit in the Caterer Delivery Cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Containers of Fruit were moved in to refrigeration at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023

The presence of drain flies (small flying insects) is not controlled as evidenced by observation of small flying insects in the kitchen area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC to inform pest control company of drain flies in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
